_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: AU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_stage_b_approval.basis: Project owner stated they manually reviewed the AU Stage B generated/reconciled tests and approved them for internal/project benchmarking. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.
_stage_b_approval.scope: AU Stage B candidate labels only; no recall-lock promotion.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: AU Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after AU Stage B precision guards

_strict_runtime_reconciliation.reason: items 1-3 deterministic detector breadth strict-label reconciliation

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: GP referral letter for physiotherapy related to a workplace injury
Her membership in the Northern Energy Workers Union and status of dues
a note of his Northern Energy Workers Union membership
would be likely to materially affect the price of Maranoa Grid Services Ltd financial products

Draft internal documents accessed included unreleased Q4 production guidance and a confidential offtake term sheet; such information is not generally available and may constitute MNPI under the Corporations Act.
We have notified the OAIC under the Notifiable Data Breaches scheme and contacted ASIC Market Integrity for guidance on any potential continuous disclosure timing.

Dr. Elias Hart (CISO) is coordinating incident response and can be reached at security@maranoagrid.au.
This is not our first rodeo, but we take it seriously; the Darraville Dingoes charity match and the Family Day at Riverside Park will proceed as scheduled.
Our SafeWork & Respect Policy 2023 and Data Retention Standard DR‑12 remain in force, and we value inclusion across cultures, religion, and sexual orientation
